steps.title: Fastest path: mark the figure first
steps.content: Mark the given angle relationships on the figure first: equal angles, vertical angles, supplementary angles, parallel-line angles, and triangle sums of $180^\circ$. Most of these questions become a short angle chase once the givens are marked.

steps.title: Set up the perimeter equation
steps.content:
The perimeter of a triangle equals the sum of its three side lengths. Two sides measure $5$ cm and $7$ cm, and the perimeter is $16$ cm. Let $x$ represent the length of the third side:
$$5 + 7 + x = 16$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
$$5 + 7 + x = 16$$
$$12 + x = 16$$
$$x = 4$$
The third side has length $4$ cm. That matches Choice B — 4.
